notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.16.5 Toolbar Icon Size adjustable: change size in settings->preferences. Mask awareness added to Cosmic Clarity, Aberration Remover, SyQon, and Multiscale Decomposition tools. Numpy compatibility updates across all AI inference engines. Stacking suite rejection algorithms updated for improved rejection accuracy. Fixed a memmap error triggered in the image loading pipeline. Fixed various subwindow bugs.

v1.16.4
Star alignment engine completely rewritten with a custom parallel implementation, delivering 2x+ faster registration. AstroAlign is no longer a required dependency. Explorer Panel now shows an active view indicator.

v1.16.3
ADBE Important fix: background subtraction now correctly performed in linear space, preventing star color corruption from nonlinear stretch artifacts. Division added as a correction option. Minor bug fixes throughout.

v1.16.2
Stacking Suite log now created and updated directly in the stacking directory. Function Bundle and View Bundle chip upgrades. Remove Stars updated for Axiom 2.2.

v1.16.1
Workflows updated with a new Run UI — a minimal interface for executing your built workflows. WIMI and WIMS now indicate when community images exist in your search area. Gallery option added to the Sky Atlas UI.

v1.16.0
Introducing the Seti Astro Community Sky Atlas — upload your plate solved final images and contribute to a community-built map of the sky from SASpro users. Let's fill it up! PSF Viewer major overhaul. Bug fixes and UX tweaks.
